narrative:
Warren City 7C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 968 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 27.7 percentage points.
